references.hebrew: וְעַ֛ל כׇּל־נַפְשֹׁ֥ת מֵ֖ת לֹ֣א יָבֹ֑א לְאָבִ֥יו וּלְאִמּ֖וֹ לֹ֥א יִטַּמָּֽא׃
references.english: He shall not go in where there is any dead body; he shall not defile himself even for his father or mother.

references.hebrew: וְלַאֲחֹת֤וֹ הַבְּתוּלָה֙ הַקְּרוֹבָ֣ה אֵלָ֔יו אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹֽא־הָיְתָ֖ה לְאִ֑ישׁ לָ֖הּ יִטַּמָּֽא׃
references.english: also for a virgin sister, close to him because she has not become someone’s [wife], for her he may defile himself.

commentary_links.hebrew: כִּ֚י אִם־לִשְׁאֵר֔וֹ הַקָּרֹ֖ב אֵלָ֑יו לְאִמּ֣וֹ וּלְאָבִ֔יו וְלִבְנ֥וֹ וּלְבִתּ֖וֹ וּלְאָחִֽיו׃
commentary_links.english: except for the relatives that are closest to him: his mother, his father, his son, his daughter, and his brother;
commentary_links.matched_snippet: דערבות ופסקוה גנבי לרישיה הכי נמי דלא

commentary_links.hebrew: וְלַאֲחֹת֤וֹ הַבְּתוּלָה֙ הַקְּרוֹבָ֣ה אֵלָ֔יו אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹֽא־הָיְתָ֖ה לְאִ֑ישׁ לָ֖הּ יִטַּמָּֽא׃
commentary_links.english: also for a virgin sister, close to him because she has not become someone’s [wife], for her he may defile himself.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: דמי &star מיתיבי לה יטמא לה הוא מטמא ואינו

commentary_links.hebrew: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֔ה אֱמֹ֥ר אֶל־הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים בְּנֵ֣י אַהֲרֹ֑ן וְאָמַרְתָּ֣ אֲלֵהֶ֔ם לְנֶ֥פֶשׁ לֹֽא־יִטַּמָּ֖א בְּעַמָּֽיו׃
commentary_links.english:
GOD said to Moses: Speak to the priests, the sons of Aaron, and say to them:
None shall defile himself for any [dead] person among his kin,
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ולרוב בניינה ולרוב מניינה כתיב ואמרת
